summary: Backend-only testing completed for Debug/Reviewer features and SupporterBadge-related APIs. All 13 tests passed (100%). Key features verified: GET /api/debug/is-reviewer correctly identifies reviewer accounts, POST /api/debug/mock-qr-scan works for reviewer accounts, GET /api/favors includes creator_is_supporter field, User model includes is_supporter field.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/debug/is-reviewer correctly returns is_reviewer=true for reviewer@test.com with debug_features_enabled=true and features=['mock_qr_scan', 'mock_gps']
POST /api/debug/mock-qr-scan properly validates auth, favor existence, favor status (must be accepted), and user participation
GET /api/favors correctly includes creator_is_supporter field with batch lookup optimization for performance
User model properly includes is_supporter field (boolean) in all user responses
Proper authentication enforcement on all debug endpoints (401 for unauthenticated requests)
Mock QR scan correctly transfers granelli and updates favor status to 'completed' with completion_method='mock_qr_debug'
seed_data_creation: Created test favors during mock QR scan flow testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Debug/Reviewer backend APIs fully tested. REVIEWER_EMAIL='reviewer@test.com' and REVIEWER_MODE_ENABLED=True are configured in server.py (lines 2246-2247). The reviewer account has access to mock_qr_scan and mock_gps debug features. Frontend components (SupporterBadge, OfflineNotice, Mock QR button) exist but frontend testing was not requested.

user_model.test_user_model_has_is_supporter_field: PASSED - is_supporter field verified in User model

favors_creator_is_supporter.test_favors_endpoint_includes_creator_is: PASSED - creator_is_supporter field present in response
favors_creator_is_supporter.test_new_favor_has_creator_is_supporter_: PASSED - field verified for newly created favors

validations: User must be participant (creator or acceptor)

response_example.message: DEBUG: Favore completato tramite mock QR scan

GET /api/favors.note: Now includes creator_is_supporter field for each favor

GET /api/auth/me.note: User model includes is_supporter boolean field
